User-agent: *
Allow: /

Sitemap: https://kritano.com/sitemap.xml

# Disallow authenticated areas
Disallow: /app/
Disallow: /admin

# Disallow API and MCP endpoints
Disallow: /mcp
Disallow: /api/

# Disallow auth pages
Disallow: /login
Disallow: /register
Disallow: /forgot-password
Disallow: /reset-password
Disallow: /verify-email
